tauth.message.reset_success: Reset %s's password. The player must register again.
tauth.message.already_registered_login: You are already registered. Use /login <password> to log in!
tauth.message.not_registered_register: You are not registered. Use /register <password> <confirm> to register!
tauth.message.not_registered_gui: You are not registered. Use /register to register!
tauth.message.auto_login_denied: Auto login conditions do not match. Please log in manually.
tauth.message.invalid_password_hash: Invalid password hash format. Please retry.
tauth.message.already_registered_direct_: You are already registered. Please log in directly.
tauth.disconnect.forgot_password: Contact an administrator to reset your password.
tauth.disconnect.login_timeout: Login timed out. You have been kicked!
tauth.disconnect.too_many_failures: Too many incorrect password attempts. You have been kicked!
tauth.command.blocked: You must log in before using this command! Use /login or /register first.
tauth.prompt.first_join_register: First time joining: use /register <password> <confirm> to register your account!
tauth.prompt.login: Use /login <password> to log in to your account!
tauth.gui.login.title: TAuth Login
tauth.gui.register.title: TAuth Register
